title: calophyllum dongnaiense
intro: Calophyllum dongnaiense, also known as Dong Nai calophyllum or Vietnamese hardwood, is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum dongnaiense include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. In herbal preparations, Calophyllum dongnaiense is often extracted as an oil or used in infusions, and it has been used in various cultures to treat a range of ailments.
